case_title: WREN, SANDRA VS KILGO, ALEX et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF WREN, SANDRA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WREN, SANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KILGO, ALEX CONNOLLY, SUZANNE $1,257.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,277.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KILGO, ALEX CONNOLLY, SUZANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT WREN, SANDRA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,016.64 FILED BY WREN, SANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT KILGO, ALEX CONNOLLY, SUZANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
